# Festa — Eggless Home Bakery, Bhayli, Vadodara

Festa is an eggless home bakery based in Bhayli, Vadodara, Gujarat (391410), India. Every cake, brownie and tea cake is baked to order from our home kitchen by founder Smriti Dixit. We do not use eggs in any recipe. All pricing is on request — WhatsApp us at +91 99631 63227 for a quote.

## What we bake

- Birthday cakes (custom and themed)
- Fruit cakes
- Anniversary and celebration cakes
- Brownies (multiple varieties)
- Tea cakes and loaf cakes
- Custom / themed cakes (fondant, toppers, character designs)
- Seasonal specials

## Full menu

### Standard Cakes
Vanilla, Coffee, Chocolate, Butterscotch, White Forest, Black Forest, Choc Walnut / Almond, Chocolate All Over, Chocolate Truffle, Truffle, Dutch, Hazelnut, Chocolate Ferrero Rocher, Belgian Chocolate Ganache, Lotus Biscoff, Chocolate Chunks, KitKat, Oreo, Rasmalai, Thandai, Paan

### Fruit Cakes
Pineapple, Strawberry, Black Currant, Raspberry, Raspberry Apple, Kiwi-Strawberry, Blueberry, Mango, Pistachio

### Tea Cakes
Walnut, Choc Walnut Brownie, Whole Wheat Walnut Brownie, Brownie, Fudgy Brownie, Oreo Brownie, Biscoff Brownie, KitKat Brownie, Nutella Brownie, Brownie Tower, Whole Wheat Almond, Oats & Wheat Mixed Dry Fruits, Whole Wheat Honey n Raisin, Whole Wheat Honey n Walnut, Jaggery Oats Whole Wheat, Chocolate Oats Whole Wheat, Oats Jowar, Oats Jowar Dry Fruits, Chocolate Oats Jowar, Sugar / Gluten Free

### Add-ons
Extra Nuts

## How to order

1. Message Festa on WhatsApp: +91 99631 63227
2. Share: cake style, flavour, weight (½ kg or 1 kg), message on top, pickup date and time
3. For custom cakes, share a reference image
4. Receive your quote and confirm the order
5. Pick up from Bhayli on the agreed date, or request third-party delivery within Vadodara

Lead time: at least 48 hours for celebration cakes; 24 hours for brownies and tea cakes. Custom or theme cakes need 3 to 5 days, especially on weekends and around festivals.

## Pricing

All pricing is on request. It depends on the flavour, weight and design. Tap any item on the website menu or message us on WhatsApp at +91 99631 63227 to get a quote.

## Delivery and pickup

- Pickup from Bhayli, Vadodara is preferred.
- Delivery within Vadodara can be arranged via a third-party delivery partner at the customer's cost.
- We do not ship outside Vadodara.

## Dietary options

- All cakes are 100% eggless — no exceptions.
- Sugar-free cakes available on request.
- Vegan cakes (no butter, no dairy) available for select flavours with prior notice.

## Storage instructions

Refrigerate the cake as soon as you bring it home. Take it out 15 to 20 minutes before serving for the best taste and texture. Cream cakes are best consumed within 48 hours of pickup.

## The story

Festa began in Hyderabad as a tiny home kitchen run by Smriti Dixit, and today bakes out of Bhayli, Vadodara. Every eggless cake is mixed, baked and finished by hand, in small batches. We use real butter, real cream and real Belgian chocolate, with no shortcuts. Each cake is baked fresh on the day of your order and packed carefully so it travels well across the city.

Birthdays, anniversaries, baby showers, daily tea cakes and gifting boxes for festivals — whatever the occasion in Vadodara, we bake it the way we would for our own family.

## Frequently asked questions

Q: Are all Festa cakes eggless?
A: Yes — 100%. Every cake, brownie and tea cake is completely eggless. No exceptions.

Q: How do I place an order?
A: Send a WhatsApp message to +91 99631 63227. Share the flavour, weight, message on top and your pickup date. We will confirm availability and send you a quote.

Q: How much notice do you need?
A: At least 48 hours for celebration cakes. Brownies and tea cakes need 24 hours. Custom or themed cakes (fondant, toppers, special designs) need 3–5 days, especially around weekends and festivals.

Q: What are your prices?
A: All pricing is on request — it depends on the flavour, weight and design. Tap any item on the menu to send a WhatsApp, or just message us directly.

Q: Do you deliver?
A: Pickup from our Bhayli kitchen is preferred. For delivery across Vadodara, we can arrange a third-party delivery partner at the customer's cost.

Q: Can I order a custom themed cake?
A: Absolutely. Birthday themes, character cakes, anniversary designs, baby shower cakes. Send a reference photo on WhatsApp and we will work out the design and quote together.

Q: Do you offer sugar-free or vegan options?
A: Sugar-free cakes are available on request. Fully vegan options are available for select flavours with a little extra notice.

Q: Where exactly are you located?
A: We are a home bakery in Bhayli, Vadodara, Gujarat — 391410. Once you place your order we will share the exact pickup address on WhatsApp.

Q: How should I store the cake?
A: Refrigerate it as soon as you are home. Take it out 15–20 minutes before serving so the cream and frosting come back to the perfect texture.

## Contact

- WhatsApp: +91 99631 63227
- Email: Smriti@festabakes.xyz
- Instagram: @festa.bakes
- Google Business: search "Festa home bakery Vadodara"
- Location: Bhayli, Vadodara, Gujarat 391410, India
- Cuisine: Bakery, Desserts (eggless)
